occupation.evidence: Customer: Nahi, job karta hun main.

temperature.evidence: Customer: Madam, ek baat batao, 15,000 rupaye mahina mein investment bhi karun main, ghar bhi chalaun.

objections.quote: Madam, ek baat batao, 15,000 rupaye mahina mein investment bhi karun main, ghar bhi chalaun.

customer_pain_points: insufficient income to cover both household expenses and investments

monthly_savings_capacity_inr.evidence: Customer: Madam, ek baat batao, 15,000 rupaye mahina mein investment bhi karun main, ghar bhi chalaun.

investment_sophistication.evidence: Customer: Nahi, nahi, nahi. (in response to having existing investment plans)

decision_maker_status.evidence: Customer: Uske alawa koi batane se mujhe main sunke kar lunga.

agent_promises: first year se hi 36% ki income aani start ho jaati hai aapki whole life ke liye
double tax benefit bhi aapko provide kiye jaate hain

product_fit.mismatch_reason: Customer has very low income and explicitly stated he cannot afford investments.

approachability.reasoning: Customer expressed significant financial strain, stating he cannot manage investments and household expenses on his current income.

call_narrative.opening_hook: The agent opened with a product pitch for a guaranteed income plan, and the customer responded by listening.
call_narrative.customer_response: The customer was initially passive but became defensive when asked about his income and investment capacity, highlighting his financial constraints.
call_narrative.key_event: The customer pushed back on the feasibility of investing given his low monthly income of 15,000 INR.
call_narrative.ending: The agent acknowledged the customer's financial difficulty and ended the call politely.

key_quotes: Madam, ek baat batao, 15,000 rupaye mahina mein investment bhi karun main, ghar bhi chalaun.
